---
name: Bug Report 🐛
about: Create a report to help us improve Tech Nexus content or code
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is (e.g., Typo in Class 10 Math notes, broken link in AI Hub).

**Where is the bug located?**
Provide the exact file path or link (e.g., `coding-academy/web-dev/01-starter-project/index.html`).

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen or what the correct text should be.

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
